title: crotalaria juncea
intro: Crotalaria juncea, also known as the ashwagandha or Indian arseweed, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria juncea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herb in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, or it can be dried and powdered to be used in capsules or added to herbal supplements.
